creator: babak@farrokhi.net
text:
Hello,

I approve this patch.

Thanks!
Babak Farrokhi

> -----Original Message-----
> From: Edwin Groothuis [mailto:edwin@FreeBSD.org]
> Sent: Friday, August 18, 2006 11:31 PM
> To: babak@farrokhi.net
> Subject: Re: ports/102244: [PATCH] www/pmwiki: update to 2.1.14
> 
> Maintainer of www/pmwiki,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/102244 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix you
> agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch and a
> committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/102244

> Edwin Groothuis
